extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed By and Against each entity. I counted only Against rows: criminal proceedings are 12 against the Company, nil against subsidiaries, 6 against Directors, 6 against Promoters and nil against Group Companies, while statutory/regulatory proceedings are nil, nil, 3, 4 and nil respectively; tax proceedings for the Company and subsidiaries are 41 and nil, excluding promoter/director tax matters and all By rows. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹50,050.34 million and against subsidiaries is nil, giving ₹50,050.34 million, or ₹5,005.034 crore, for the consolidated group; the source unit is million. The contingent-liabilities table is as at June 30, 2024 and has no stated Total row, so the quantified line items were summed to ₹14,352.98 million, or ₹1,435.298 crore, excluding no listed quantified items; amounts described as not ascertainable are not included. The only concentration percentages for customers concern Order Book, not company-wide revenue from operations or total income, so top-five and top-ten customer revenue percentages are not disclosed; the source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
